name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you're comfortable doing so, share your story about how the coronavirus pandemic is affecting you and your loved ones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Americans shouldn't be worrying about keeping a roof over their heads or being able to afford food in the middle of a global pandemic. But that's exactly what's happening -- and we need to speak up... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525793/45c30650/1f4e4d812/66e97bdc/3303843037/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
6.6 million Americans filed for unemployment last week.

That's a new record -- and it's also only the tip of the iceberg. Millions more have lost their jobs and weren't counted or are worrying about their next paycheck after their hours were cut.

**Americans shouldn 't be worrying about keeping a roof over their heads or being able to afford food in the middle of a global pandemic. But that's exactly what's happening -- and we need to speak up, call it out, and fight back.**

**[That's why -- if you've been struggling to make ends meet or with being unemployed during this pandemic and are comfortable sharing your circumstances -- I want to hear from you. Click here to share your story with me and add your voice to the fight for change.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525793/45c30650/1f4e4d812/66e97bdf/3303843037/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwM1BfU0dOX1NIUl9FXzIwMjAwNDAyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrendemocrats-covid-story-share?source=EMQ03P_SGN_SHR_E_20200402_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

From families battling homelessness, to seniors living off of Social Security, to working parents without child care, our families are in a crisis and they need help now.

Every day, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure our relief efforts are going to the families who need it -- not to giant corporations.

**But I can 't do it alone -- the voices and stories of working people who have been hit the hardest by this crisis need to be heard in Washington and across the country.**

**[If you're comfortable doing so, click here to share your story with me about how the coronavirus pandemic is affecting you and your loved ones -- and help shine a light on all the ways this crisis is affecting working families.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525793/45c30650/1f4e4d812/66e97bdf/3303843037/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwM1BfU0dOX1NIUl9FXzIwMjAwNDAyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrendemocrats-covid-story-share?source=EMQ03P_SGN_SHR_E_20200402_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Hope you are staying safe and well during this challenging time and, as always, thanks for being a part of this.

Elizabeth
| [**SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525793/45c30650/1f4e4d812/66e97bdf/3303843037/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwM1BfU0dOX1NIUl9FXzIwMjAwNDAyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrendemocrats-covid-story-share?source=EMQ03P_SGN_SHR_E_20200402_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana's education updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb reminded Hoosiers that COVID-19 doesn’t distinguish between groups of people. Every single one of us is a potential vessel that could | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

_**“We can’t deny the facts on the ground and we don’t want to kid ourselves about our kids’ health and safety.”**_

Today, Governor Holcomb announced that _**all K-12 schools will provide remote learning for the remainder of the school year.**_

This decision wasn’t made lightly, but it is _**necessary**_ to ensure the health of our students, teachers and staff.

Here’s what this means for our schools and students:
* Schools that reached _**160 instruction days**_ will be considered to have completed _**a full academic year.**_
* Schools short of 160 instruction days are required to provide at least _**20 additional days of remote learning**_ between now and the end of the academic year.
* If a school completes 20 days of e-learning and still fall shorts of the required 160 instructional days, IDOE can waive the difference.
* Seniors enrolled in graduation-track courses _**will receive credit towards graduation**_ for those courses, and they’ll be given _**the flexibility needed to earn their Indiana high school diploma.**_
* Freshman, sophomores and juniors will _**need to complete their credit requirements,**_ and it will be local schools’ decision on whether that credit has been earned.
* Local districts have until _**April 17**_ to submit continuous learning plans to the Indiana Department of Education.
* School buildings are to remain closed _**unless being used for other needs outlined by the state.**_
* Expiring teacher licenses will be extended through _**September 1, 2020.**_

_**“Even though our teachers and students have been apart, they’re still together and I’ve been inspired by the many creative ways instruction is continuing.” –Governor Holcomb**_

Governor Holcomb reminded Hoosiers that COVID-19 doesn’t distinguish between groups of people. Every single one of us is a potential vessel that could spread this virus.

These short-term efforts are unquestionably challenging and could lead to hardship. However, the long-term benefit of staying home, practicing social distancing, and minimizing contact with each other allows us to sail these uncharted waters much quicker and safer than if we do nothing.

As Governor Holcomb said, **“We must make sure that we’re keeping the unity in our community,”** and remember that we’re all #INThisTogether.

-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

He 's looking for 202 more donations, bringing our match total up to 700.** _**" Why is he doing this," you might ask...**_ **Because turning the Senate blue is his first priority -- and the Admiral is vested in making it happen.[_Can you chip in now?_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2494/33365068/4a68b233/3f8bee47/573992252/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200402_extend2_em_fr_all_l1")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2494/33365068/4a68b233/3f8bee40/573992252/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200402_extend2_em_fr_all_btn")

This is all because of you, crew. Without your support we couldn't run such a comprehensive online campaign. It is going great.
**But we need to continue this effort from now until November.[_Can you chip in any amount today? As a reminder, the Admiral will match your donation so, it goes twice as far!_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2494/33365068/4a68b233/3f8bee41/573992252/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200402_extend2_em_fr_all_l2")**

name: Team Christy
subject: NEW GOP attack ad = NEW goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

Just this week, the National Republican Congressional Committee started airing a nasty negative ad campaign against Christy Smith.

They are chomping at the bit to take back this seat -- and they will stop at nothing to try to smear Christy's record.

We raised our fundraising goals for our end-of-quarter deadline -- and although we passed our original goal, we came up a bit short of the $75,000 we wanted to hit in order to compete with their big ad buy.

**[We need you to pitch in now to close the gap -- can you rush a donation right now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb245/423069656/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb246/423069656/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb247/423069656/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb240/423069656/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb241/423069656/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb242/423069656/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb245/423069656/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full")
We have to push back quickly against these reckless, angry lies about Christy's record -- and we do that by upping our online organizing efforts, getting our own ads on the air, and reaching as many voters in our district as possible.

Mike Garcia can call up corporate PACs to fill his campaign coffers. We will **never** do that, but that means we have to turn to the people we can count on to help us: **YOU**.

**[We are $6,098 short of meeting the goal we set for ourselves on Tuesday -- can you give right now to make sure we have the resources we need to defeat Mike Garcia, corporate interests, and the NRCC?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d3/29776869/a10eed7/569fb245/423069656/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfbnJjY2FkLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_nrccad-full")**

Thanks for stepping up. We need to meet the moment.

\-- Team Christy

name: Team Chabot
subject: ICYMI: Call to action to combat COVID-19 in Ohio, US
body:
Throughout Ohio, many businesses are making responsible, but painful decisions to close their doors in an effort to help stop the spread of COVID-19.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-r/) **In Case You Missed It** _Cincinnati Enquirer: Op-Ed: Call to action to combat COVID-19 in Ohio, US_ By Steve ChabotApril 2, 2020Throughout Ohio, many businesses are making responsible, but painful decisions to close their doors in an effort to help stop the spread of COVID-19. The COVID-19 pandemic is having devastating financial consequences on those businesses and their workers. Too many people have lost their jobs or have been furloughed, and are now facing increasingly dire personal financial situations.As the current ranking member and former chairman of the House Small Business Committee, it pains me to see so many people and businesses struggling throughout our communities. That's why in Congress we passed legislation recently that will provide immediate relief to small businesses and every day Ohioans affected by the coronavirus crisis. This legislative relief will swiftly send checks (depending on income) to U.S. citizens, and provide financial assistance for small businesses so they don't close down permanently.Democratic Chairwoman Nydia Velazquez and I have worked with our counterparts in the Senate to ensure that small businesses, and not just large corporations, will receive substantial assistance from the Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act. Because of that bipartisan work, small businesses across the country will be eligible for generous, low-interest loans, which are forgivable.In our nation's efforts to combat this epidemic, one particular concern is the need for increasing the supply of personal protection equipment (PPE) for health care workers, and ventilators for patients who will need them for their very survival. I, along with six Republican members of Congress, and seven Democrats, introduced a Resolution urging the Administration to utilize the Defense Production Act to produce these life-saving items as expeditiously as possible. Already, we've seen tech companies coming together to fight this disease. Google has launched a website touted by President Trump that provides state resources, safety, and prevention tips relating to COVID-19. The company is also offering technology resources to businesses across the country.Others are doing their part as well. Zoom is helping people stay socially connected. Facebook is offering $100 million in small business grants. And companies like Tesla, Ford, and General Motors are exploring their capacity to manufacture ventilators.Going forward, we must also take every precaution to see that the United States is best positioned to avoid potential pandemics in the future. Again, in a bipartisan effort, Congressman Gerry Connolly of Virginia and I introduced the Global Health Security Act (H.R. 2166) which would elevate health security as a global priority. The bill passed by an overwhelmingly bipartisan vote in the House Foreign Affairs Committee, and would significantly help prevent infectious diseases from spreading from other countries to the United States.This crisis has presented Ohioans and companies, both big and small, with unprecedented challenges, that must be taken seriously. Based on our current knowledge of the coronavirus, it appears that many people who contract the disease will recover with minimal complications, and some may not even show symptoms. However, the elderly and those with underlying health conditions, are vulnerable to serious illness or death. Thus, we must unite as a nation to take the necessary precautions to ensure that the virus does not spread.Mitigating the impact of COVID-19 will require legislative relief, social distancing, economic stimulus, new technologies, and the minds of our best scientists to produce a vaccine and a treatment. We are all in this together, but I have no doubt that we will recover and thrive as a nation united.[Read the full op-ed here.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-y/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-j/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-t/)
---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhhkuka-961825B2-kujkulhluu-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhhkuka-kujkulhluu-o/)

Dear Friend, Even though we're going entirely digital, we still need your support to get the word out. **[So please click here and help out if you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16835993/179240595/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_line1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZlZTFkMy1iNjc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOUTa4iXeIvf1j7sDElj0nVixys2JZT3BuCbK2XUlZw=).** Because this is what we're up against. On Fox and Friends Donald Trump said that Democrats' push to expand vote by mail would generate "levels of voting that if you ever agreed to it you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again." It's a blunt admission that the Republicans are a minority party who depend on voter suppression to stay in power. Here in TX17 we face a gerrymandered district as well as various forms of voter suppression. In a normal year, it would be nearly impossible for a Democrat to win. But this is not a normal year. The COVID-19 pandemic has revealed not only the incompetence of the Trump administration, but also the price to be paid for decades of under-investment in public health and individual health care. These issues will be foremost in Central Texans' minds come November, and for the first time in more than a decade they'll be open to a new message. clean_body: | = Dear Friend, Even though we're going entirely digital, we still need your support to get the word out. =. Because this is what we're up against. On Fox and Friends Donald Trump said that Democrats' push to expand vote by mail would generate "levels of voting that if you ever agreed to it you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again." It's a blunt admission that the Republicans are a minority party who depend on voter suppression to stay in power. Here in TX17 we face a gerrymandered district as well as various forms of voter suppression. In a normal year, it would be nearly impossible for a Democrat to win. But this is not a normal year. The COVID-19 pandemic has revealed not only the incompetence of the Trump administration, but also the price to be paid for decades of under-investment in public health and individual health care. These issues will be foremost in Central Texans' minds come November, and for the first time in more than a decade they'll be open to a new message. Please help out, so we can make sure they hear ours. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Stay safe, and stay home. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: David Buskill
subject: Fwd: Please watch & share

body:
This effort is vital. Please review & respond today. Read more >>
Fellow Hoosier, Dr. Chuck emailed you the other day to watch his new ad. I hope you have had the chance to watch the ad and get to know Dr. Chuck a bit more. I’ve forwarded his message, in case you missed it. You can check it out below. **This ad is a GREAT introduction to Dr. Chuck... and now, we need your help to get it in front of voters!** Our campaign strategy has changed dramatically in recent weeks, as we observe current protocols to help slow the spread of the coronavirus. Right now, the best way to reach folks is online. Today, I’m writing to ask for your help to do just that. Follow one of the links below to help share Dr. Chuck’s message. You can see the direct impact your support will make! **[Donate $5 to Reach 10 Voters>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/262db764aff53581c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**
**[Donate $15 to Reach 30 Voters>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/c3b87b7eb13dd171c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**
**[Donate $50 to Reach 100 Voters>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/d19a64f39a1ec260c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** **[Donate $100 to Reach 1,000 Voters>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/40e5598712255d36c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
** Thank you, in advance, for ANY level of support you can provide. It means the world to Dr. Chuck to have you on board! All the best, David Buskill
Campaign Manager
Chuck Dietzen for Congress | |
---
From: Dr. Chuck
To: All Supporters
Date: Thursday, April 2, 2020 6:15 p.m.
Subject: Please watch & share
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/fb3a8aa8dc12b2fac3d6b838967d376c/33363)
Fellow Hoosier,

With the COVID-19 protocols in place, traditional campaign events have been put on hold. While we follow all necessary protocols, including social distancing, designed to help slow the spread of the coronavirus, we are using virtual methods to connect with you.

Our online efforts are more important than ever.

On Thursday, we launch our new ad where I explain what inspired me to run for Congress, and what I’ll work for in Washington. I’m writing to ask you to tune into Facebook on Thursday at 7:00 p.m. to watch with us as we debut this ad.

**[Tap or click here to join our Watch Party to premiere our new ad on Facebook!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/f066f5aa6b0f6428c3d6b838967d376c/33363)**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/42ca0b3ce434a63bc3d6b838967d376c/33363)
As a pediatric doctor, the children I’ve worked with have taught me so much – courage, compassion, truth, and decency. They are all things that are missing in Washington, and I want to change that.

**[Please join us on Thursday at 7 p.m. to watch the ad and help share my message](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/f5414032cfa1ec25c3d6b838967d376c/33363).**

I am grateful beyond words for your support in this race.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/d64e8a305fbbb920c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
-Dr. Chuck
[ **Join Our Watch Party >>>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/1074cf3426bf6b59c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/d25a115f9c89493ec3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/2957222002a7a932/b6d4e12531a88533c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: With Gratitude for Democrats Running for Office in this Uncertain Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp-long-%20fo%20newsletter.jpg]
Dear Peter ,
A dangerous and turbulent time — like the one our country is experiencing right now — is a stark reminder of why we need steady leadership at all levels of government. Leadership that listens to experts, follows the recommendation of scientists, and always prioritizes protecting families and keeping communities safe.
Yesterday was the filing deadline for candidates to appear on the November ballot and Democrats stepped up to answer the people’s calls for change in priorities, policy, and leadership. Our 2020 candidates represent the strength of the diversity of our great state and embody our Tennessee Democratic Party values - that every Tennessean, no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray, or who you love, should have the opportunity for a better life for you and your family.
This week I'm dedicating my letter to every Democratic candidate that filed a petition and every single signee who found a creative and COVID-19 safe way to put their signature on a petition. We are at a crossroads in this state and in the country, and the 2020 election will be one of the most important in our history. This is a difficult time and every day we head into unfamiliar territory. Please join me in applauding every person who, with courage and conviction, stepped up to run for office to work for and protect Tennessee families. Thank you for your leadership.
With Gratitude,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
PS: Campaigning is being reenvisioned during this time and our candidates are finding new ways of meeting voters and talking about their plans for a better future for all. To that end, the TNDP will showcase Democratic candidates through Facebook Live Events every Thursday at 4 pm CT and on our “If You Don’t Know, Now You Know” Podcast. More info below.
CONVERSATIONS AND QUESTIONS:
JERRI GREEN, STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 83
https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/202213184536922/ [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/202213184536922/]This week we sat down with One Tough Mother, Jerri Green, candidate for TN House District 83. Hear first hand the issues Jerri plans to tackle in office, how her family has shaped her values, and what it means to be a mom running for office. Watch the video! [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/202213184536922/]
Join Jerri's Campaign! [https://www.jerrigreen.com/]
Conversations and Questions is a weekly happy hour where we sit down with candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.
TENNESSEE DEMOCRATS DEMAND
GOP MAKE DAVID BYRD RESIGN
Last year, Governor Bill Lee, along with Republican Speaker Cameron Sexton and the entire GOP caucus, implicitly condoned Representative David Byrd’s sexual assault of three 15 to 16 year olds when they refused to take even the smallest action and ask him to resign. Governor Lee said that even though he believed the victim, he wouldn’t take definitive action. Now, David Byrd is running for office again. Read TNDP Chair Mary Mancini's full statement. [https://tndp.org/tndp-party-chair-statement-condemning-republicans-complacency-towards-david-byrd/?fbclid=IwAR09IqEhv6KEw8mATPIuS8DX2o7s-xFBkf-sSiishdi_ET_CigITgbTwDaI]
TNDP CHAIR, MARY MANCINI, JOINS
STATE DEMOCRATIC PARTY LEADERS IN
URGING FOR VOTE BY MAIL
"Action to safeguard our electoral system cannot wait. In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." TNDP chair, Mary Mancini, joined other state party chairs in writing a letter urging election commissions and governments to adopt a vote by mail system. Read the full letter. [https://www.krwg.org/post/national-push-vote-mail-system-november?fbclid=IwAR1m4cv575a1MXPT6S5NbM7psBSzfAA-dP9NV9vwdb4Kuy4AsGE81ut60_w]
IF YOU DON'T KNOW, NOW YOU KNOW:
A TNDP PODCAST
https://tndp.org/podcast/ [https://tndp.org/podcast/]
This year we head to the ballot box, both locally and nationally. It feels weird to say that given the current state of our country and world, but, elections now are crucial to our economy and health. Use some of your time at home to catch up on some of the biggest stories in Tennessee's legislature.
If You Don’t Know, Now You Know: A TNDP Podcast is hosted by Tennessee Democratic Party Chair, Mary Mancini. Recorded live from the Tennessee state capitol in Nashville, we speak with lawmakers, activists, and candidates, people who can tell you – and show you – how the laws are made that affect our lives. There’s no shortage of issues to be covered – about freedom, opportunity, equity, justice, and safety.
Listen now! [https://tndp.org/podcast/]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-04-03%20at%2011.25.28%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-04-03%20at%2011.00.51%20AM.png]
YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS IN ACTION
In the face of the pandemic, Democrats are leading the charge to save and protect Tennesseeans. Before they were elected though, they had to be recruited and trained through the Democratic Party. Any contribution you give today, will help us strengthen our pipeline of candidates and ensure we have effective campaigns running.
Will you consider donating today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Mike Siegel
subject: re: new endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16842189/179297112/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM0OGQ2Yi1jYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHvuA6ycHVzPphKVQnxJgWc3sTlbCzGnhVPZWY1LJBI=&emci=47c48d6b-ca75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=4ac48d6b-ca75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

**We have got some good news this week.**

Our campaign has always been about real progressive change. Because of that, we’ve received the support of every single local Democratic organization to endorse in our race as well many other groups across the country.

Today, I’m happy to announce we are adding to that list with Democracy for America and Patriotic Millionaires.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16842190/179297113/533471126?refcode=em013120&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM0OGQ2Yi1jYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHvuA6ycHVzPphKVQnxJgWc3sTlbCzGnhVPZWY1LJBI=)
**DFA CEO Yvette Simpson: ** “Democracy for America isn’t just endorsing Mike Siegel in Texas’ 10th District because he nearly beat his eight-term Republican opponent in 2018 or because he won the first round of the Democratic primary by more than 11 points. “While it's clear that Mike Siegel is well poised to turn Texas’ 10th blue, Democracy for America is endorsing Mike Siegel for Congress because we know that when he gets there he’ll be an unequivocal, progressive champion for working families in Texas. “Mike Siegel understands that the problems we face, from the tattered healthcare system that the COVID-19 crisis has exposed to the climate emergency that looms on the horizon.” These organizations are working to lift up campaigns like ours because they understand that it isn’t just about flipping seats red to blue, but who will fight for us once in office.
[Help support our grassroots campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16842191/179297114/203122784?refcode=em040320&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM0OGQ2Yi1jYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHvuA6ycHVzPphKVQnxJgWc3sTlbCzGnhVPZWY1LJBI=)
Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

clean_body: Peter, We have got some good news this week. Our campaign has always been about real progressive change. Because of that, we’ve received the support of every single local Democratic organization to endorse in our race as well many other groups across the country. Today, I’m happy to announce we are adding to that list with Democracy for America and Patriotic Millionaires. = DFA CEO Yvette Simpson: “Democracy for America isn’t just endorsing Mike Siegel in Texas’ 10th District because he nearly beat his eight-term Republican opponent in 2018 or because he won the first round of the Democratic primary by more than 11 points. “While it's clear that Mike Siegel is well poised to turn Texas’ 10th blue, Democracy for America is endorsing Mike Siegel for Congress because we know that when he gets there he’ll be an unequivocal, progressive champion for working families in Texas. “Mike Siegel understands that the problems we face, from the tattered healthcare system that the COVID-19 crisis has exposed to the climate emergency that looms on the horizon.” These organizations are working to lift up campaigns like ours because they understand that it isn’t just about flipping seats red to blue, but who will fight for us once in office. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Dean Browning
subject: Reminder: Will You Help Me?
body:

| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you and your family are doing well and staying safe and healthy. Tonight, at midnight, we close the books on the first quarter of 2020.
We are a little short of our goal for the quarter. Will you contribute today to help our campaign reach its goal?

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Virtual Town Hall with Prof. Danielle Allen
body:
Peter,

I hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy during this difficult time. Since you're a valued member of our community, I’m inviting you to our Virtual Town Hall next Tuesday evening about crucial nationwide efforts to fight this pandemic and how our campaign is adapting. I’m honored to be joined by Danielle Allen, James Bryant Conant University Professor at Harvard University and Director of Harvard's Edmond J. Safra Center for Ethics. She is a widely known political theorist who has published broadly in democratic theory, political sociology, and the history of political thought. She is also a contributing columnist for The Washington Post.

Professor Allen has been working with an interdisciplinary committee of experts at Harvard’s Edmond J. Safra Center on an integrated response to COVID-19, including a Mobilize and Transition to Pandemic Resilience plan and efforts to massively ramp up testing nationwide. This plan views the pandemic as a major national security threat, and responds by arguing for a mobilization of resources on testing and health infrastructure with the speed, public investment, and organizational coordination of war-time. In addition to discussing these efforts with Professor Allen, I'll share an update on our campaign and I look forward to answering some of your questions.

Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress Virtual Town Hall

with Professor Danielle Allen

James Bryant Conant University Professor at Harvard University

Director of Harvard’s Edmond J. Safra Center for Ethics

Contributing Columnist for The Washington Post

Tuesday, April 7, 2020

6:30-7:30PM EST

Zoom conferencing information will be shared with registered participants:

please RSVP below.

CLICK HERE TO RSVP https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSelCfKFgwSP63yhfADXIheX-tQSusZAdCnjzoPfP7bt60-Uuw/viewform

As our campaign goes fully digital, I am so grateful for your continued support which is strengthening our movement and building our pathway to victory. Our people-powered campaign still depends on each and every member of our community meeting this pivotal moment with dedication, generosity, and activism. I hope you can join us, because now more than ever, Brooklyn deserves more.

Best,
Adem

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright © 2020 Friends of Adem, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you have subscribed to emails from Adem for Congress, made a donation to or volunteered for the campaign, or are a friend of Adem Bunkeddeko. |
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Friends of Adem
P.O. Box 130-427
Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/wM87SoQrWUsBjNzhqUIpIvoGtlbvKR5MKmM1JQpiaN8=/nZfaF0lxRZdINQAlEZltaYKcfFe102ApCrPBA64J_qM=.

name: Jason Yates
subject: This Sunday: My Faith Votes LIVE with Pastor Allen Jackson
body:
| | Peter, As our friend, Pastor Allen Jackson says, “We’re walking through an unusual season. It feels like everything beneath us is shaking.” But now is the time for us to reorient our lives with God at the center of it. It’s a tremendous opportunity to move from being “occasional” to “intentional” in our Christian faith. **Join us, this Sunday, April 5, at 4:00 PM ET and 1:00 PM PT, for a LIVE Conversation with Pastor Allen Jackson.** Pastor Jackson will share lifesaving characteristics he’s observed in those who have a deep, meaningful faith, which is the topic of his new book, _Intentional Faith, Aligning Your Life with the Heart of God._ Drawing upon years of pastoral ministry and his own experience, Allen Jackson has developed a 100-day plan to reinvigorate a believer's life. Together, we invite you into this journey with us. RSVP to the LIVE event [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzThPWpvPCyMwA7jvmH-hY_P44hWW7eXEuXwN-j6uYqsOeTrfvx2c7w9NAW3aiMGZAmLTZdxl4SQvuQeHwTQ1tUZ-TAWf-L42ySUvaytbP-w4A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200403com01&n=1). It will be streamed LIVE on both Facebook and YouTube. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzThPWpvPCyMwA7jvmH-hY_P44hWW7eXEuXwN-j6uYqsOeTrfvx2c7w9NAW3aiMGZAmLTZdxl4SQvuQeHwTQ1tUZ-TAWf-L42ySUvaytbP-w4A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200403com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200403com01&n=3)

clean_body: | | Peter, As our friend, Pastor Allen Jackson says, “We’re walking through an unusual season. It feels like everything beneath us is shaking.” But now is the time for us to reorient our lives with God at the center of it. It’s a tremendous opportunity to move from being “occasional” to “intentional” in our Christian faith. Join us, this Sunday, April 5, at 4:00 PM ET and 1:00 PM PT, for a LIVE Conversation with Pastor Allen Jackson. Pastor Jackson will share lifesaving characteristics he’s observed in those who have a deep, meaningful faith, which is the topic of his new book, Intentional Faith, Aligning Your Life with the Heart of God. Drawing upon years of pastoral ministry and his own experience, Allen Jackson has developed a 100-day plan to reinvigorate a believer's life. Together, we invite you into this journey with us. RSVP to the LIVE event . It will be streamed LIVE on both Facebook and YouTube. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below. © 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Administration Moving Swiftly to Address Ventilator Shortages
body:
"The Trump administration has worked with 10 manufacturers on a plan to deliver an additional 5,000 ventilators within the next 30 days." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2dd0c7fa9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Administration Moving Swiftly to Address Ventilator Shortages**

“Ventilators represent the last line of defense for patients suffering with severe COVID-19 symptoms. We are moving swiftly in Trump Time to address a significant shortage of these lifesavers,” writes Peter Navarro, Director of the White House Office of Trade and Manufacturing Policy, in _USA Today_.

“The Trump administration has worked with 10 manufacturers on a plan to deliver an additional 5,000 ventilators within the next 30 days, and more than 100,000 additional ventilators by the end of June. In a page taken out of the World War II playbook, the Ford Motor Co., with General Electric, is racing to produce an additional 50,000 new ventilators in 100 days at a converted auto plant in Michigan.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67d13d83bf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Lower taxes and fewer regulations unleashed the best economy in half a century and gave small businesses the means to hire more employees, pay higher wages, and reinvest capital. These conditions still exist but are being seriously challenged by the coronavirus pandemic, a true ‘black swan’ catastrophe. While our nation continues to fight against this pandemic, we have a responsibility in Congress to help small businesses survive this storm,” House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ed9241dcf&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Amid the coronavirus pandemic, President Trump has emerged as a strong wartime president [against] an unseen enemy,” Rep. Buddy Carter (R-GA) writes. “He has risen to the occasion beautifully and fully activated the power of the federal government and private sector to slow the spread of this disease.” Read more in the [_Effingham Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d90d2e59e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Small businesses will be able to access new loans starting Friday to help them stay afloat during the economic crisis wrought by the coronavirus. The $2.2 trillion coronavirus relief bill passed by Congress and signed by President Donald Trump established a $350 billion Paycheck Protection Program,” Fred Lucas reports in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=281a724d32&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ed71238f9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=008899a9ac&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=815ba77436)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Sri
subject: Major News About Our Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Yesterday, our campaign received the incredible news that we have been named to the DCCC's (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) prestigious Red to Blue list.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/YjtX_9MUvgEUIerMlfp_bHQP9KOsZWVgc5bqgGhQUWs=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team,

**Yesterday, our campaign received the incredible news that we have been named to the DCCC 's (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) prestigious Red to Blue list.**

Not only are we one of the best pick-up opportunities to flip a seat blue in Texas -- we're now also recognized by Democratic leaders as one of the strongest campaigns in the entire country and it's because of supporters like you.

This is game-changing news for our campaign, but it also guarantees enormous investments will be flooded into this race by outside special interest groups determined to stop Sri.**[Can we count on you to give $15, or whatever you can, to help us prepare for these upcoming attacks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/3yxLDzAHqy72HvkX7dYtjOidX1HlKV5T43dNw4YNrTU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)** | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=25)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=50)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=100)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)

While we're focused on running a campaign that TX-22 can be proud of, our opponents seem to be in a race to the bottom in their Republican runoff election.

Just this week in TX-22, we've seen GOP megadonor, Kathaleen Wall, broadcast a race baiting ad that endangers our Asian American community.

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/3yxLDzAHqy72HvkX7dYtjOidX1HlKV5T43dNw4YNrTU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)

Rhetoric and hate like this has no place in our district -- let alone in Congress, friend.

Let's make sure it doesn't happen.

**Donate now to our campaign to help us flip this seat blue and elect a leader like Sri who is working to bring our communities and our country together -- not divide it.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/3yxLDzAHqy72HvkX7dYtjOidX1HlKV5T43dNw4YNrTU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)**

Thank you, friend,
Team Sri
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/PK0VW2I6j5vLwbU9Tnrx5tsHIPkX21oOgdtznzxxyUc=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.3_ts_b1_all&amount=15)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com/](https://act.myngp.com/el/bohk2rG3hMD2Ud3qm_8PJMPvrMM_DhvxBeUY-v1Pu8Q=/xOB74IOaKDLvZBNqrH5qBabtsJuj46V4gaB197i5WBA=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---

name: GOP Alerts
subject: This is your last opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
President Trump is watching the Republican and Democrat fundraising race very closely, especially in battleground states like Minnesota, where he knows every dollar counts.

name: Rita Hart
subject: Rita Review: Coronavirus Resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/CKxgIVSzmh7gLb3i9hGK9T3EK-55LjRz6mh5r4BpCgU=?refcode=200403-email) _As the state of Iowa continues to feel the effects of Coronavirus, we 're taking a moment to send you updates about the Coronavirus, how it affects our local communities and how we can keep ourselves and our loved ones safe._ **Safety note for the Coronavirus** For the Rita Review this month, we want to make sure to reiterate the importance of our public health. We want to ensure you're all staying safe and taking the necessary precautions to protect yourself and your loved ones from COVID-19. Please refer to the CDC's website for the most up to date information: [https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-nCoV/index.html](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/-du8-qe70ILl6f8ADyBP_Pb68BHniXyH66CR1sNPLF4=) **Social distancing** Social distancing is the adopted method to slow the spread of the virus. As more people are staying at home and staying 6 feet apart from others, the exponential spread of the virus will slow and we will successfully "flatten the curve." This will create a sustainable environment for our healthcare workers. I want to encourage everyone to take this idea seriously and only leave the house for essential activities. If we work together, we can stop the spread. While we are physically distancing to help keep everyone safe and healthy, don't forget to stay in touch with friends and neighbors. Mental health is important just like physical health and we need to take care of each other even while we are apart! **Donations** Foodbanks, hospitals, shelters and other public entities are accepting donations of all kinds in preparation for an influx of need. If possible, please consider donating to help our most vulnerable. Please consider donating medical personal protective equipment, such as gloves or facemasks, to our hospitals, cleaning supplies to shelters, or money to our food banks. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/PRLmv7qoSJVLciHQjOCmG1cLYVyxhZoV-wbfOqLNzO4=) **Small Businesses** On March 23, Governor Reynolds announced a new [Iowa Small Business Relief Program](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/-Ix43-Mf8DXDWAPMvB9uO7LGBJ3wBSzEo9yAQxW7Gu8=) to provide financial assistance to small businesses and tax deferrals to Iowa businesses economically impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic. The program offers grants ranging from $5,000-$25,000, as well as relief regarding taxes and penalties to eligible businesses. If you are a small business owner feeling the effects of this pandemic, please apply as soon as possible. The CARES Act also set up a Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) which provides financial incentives for small businesses to keep their current employees on their payroll or even bring back employees who had been laid off or furloughed. [For more information, go here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/BJ9-FtllR1k0GstmTPKWPxylfo1X_pXl5Hf_bu4KqvI=) **Resources for Workers** If you have recently been laid off or furloughed or your hours have been dramatically cut, please visit Iowa Workforce Development's website where you can file for unemployment and other CARES Act benefits. [Here is a list of FAQs regarding who is eligible for aid and how you can apply.](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/WCk7rZ1KcpRMbCyTz7DuzIRG7Knt-qz9d9p0gYdgx-o=) **Schools** School closures are determined by each district, but at this time, all schools will be closed for the next 4 weeks. Several food banks will be opening their resources at schools during these closures if food assistance is needed for children at home. Expect all coming public events to be canceled. While more than 80% of those who contract the Coronavirus experience mild symptoms, the elderly and those with diabetes, heart disease, lung disease and immunodeficiencies are at a high risk of more serious, and even deadly, symptoms. Even if you're not at high risk, make sure you're following the below guidelines in order to keep our most vulnerable communities safe: [Center for Disease Control's Resources for Households](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/Vi6eATGZ1KkWvKPXCC93dZosGOvM-ePEMNXwuiZeG_o=) [Iowa Department of Public Health's Resources](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/A4FqY2x72vvxHzK_8b9_9vHUVEV9uHItTu_HHEWSgUc=) Sending all of you a virtual hug,
Rita Hart | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/CKxgIVSzmh7gLb3i9hGK9T3EK-55LjRz6mh5r4BpCgU=?refcode=200403-email)******
---
__ __
__Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
__
__Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States__
__If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/F1fnljhKO-jrfisi9XvERxNU7dKHHO5G2XLWply3Zlk=/lH_NF_jQjsuxEIuoqAzFRjyQbBNO45_waxapqzLckCA=).__

body:
As too many of us know firsthand, the Coronavirus crisis has been an especially hard time for small business owners and workers. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79728608749e4e2f9e957a24c1bea84e&_e=avgFOojbHsP3UdzruDaEdIbSUZ5nniT9DYJMwMqH44t5GqyArqyl1XohRsR2UraYDBpLSSLyEr1Vis7Glovbk2NaAMXyzzYyBtbur4hnv4E-pJ5Amx-E7eNp1gYCgDTkd0zzhBbkhQ7V03xl_KtevTySPIYI8BSIk5TVhB2ROOaxvpwRT4CUPWL5_LY6Y9IV5QAuGIW8EJuhPd_0u7ORFviwvFFuUsI3yQ3DIaTHFnad8DbIPp41dVc1uh58HL8HiSsPa-eqETjYQ8FCFLXhA6POSI9ksA-7RGNjLkQ1d2T1E9obnc8OA_wtqcPabYp1QefMWmkPG4_k5maAp8EGCq-SyHtNMOohsfiweZGnqtqbemQ49eUj_lgzYgXSw2WLKoNZZqNYIy1frMjiryRDIGJsCTnzzkrNVq0rP5VYg9sNpe17f3QKx15itt6HRw_SI2z4gy7wIQA1SwHDtzSHKOwTDmVpBBjnFkEd2ay-ZSE%3D) **🚨 ALERT: WE'RE HIGHLIGHTING LOCAL BUSINESS 🚨** [ **JOIN US NOW >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79728608749e4e2f9e957a24c1bea84e&_e=avgFOojbHsP3UdzruDaEdIbSUZ5nniT9DYJMwMqH44t5GqyArqyl1XohRsR2UraYDBpLSSLyEr1Vis7Glovbk2NaAMXyzzYyBtbur4hnv4E-pJ5Amx-E7eNp1gYCgDTkd0zzhBbkhQ7V03xl_KtevTySPIYI8BSIk5TVhB2ROOaxvpwRT4CUPWL5_LY6Y9IV5QAuGIW8EJuhPd_0u7ORFviwvFFuUsI3yQ3DIaTHFnad8DbIPp41dVc1uh58HL8HiSsPa-eqETjYQ8FCFLXhAyzw4bgeBHI9DYDdrAHYzRXt-eaeNFuYCMvyC3IRw49xB7eNQzcHwHLHyp3PwPTm6_wAMGXGbGgwhDf3oexgE3dbVXJ2wM2L4OH_aUMKB5w34NW61phyyPzLUOTFH1uLgEgT8pWwqpKmTB1UOYJVKWdg6VcgzfQ-P0SzUoXdXMl9PvuhzssCN89-JPxhmHdueUX0scnxK-edo1iMrfMEL1w%3D) | |
---
Friend,

As too many of us know firsthand, the COVID-19 crisis has been an especially hard time for small business owners and workers.

The orders put in place to mitigate the spread of the virus have been particularly hard on our local restaurants, especially independently owned and operated ones, which are cultural institutions in our Upstate communities.

That’s why I’m announcing today, our initiative to highlight and support our local businesses. Starting today, we're going to promote some of our favorite spots and YOUR favorite spots in New York's 22nd district to send some business their way. Will you join us in strengthening our community and support our small businesses now?
[ **YES: SUPPORT SMALL BUSINESS >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79728608749e4e2f9e957a24c1bea84e&_e=avgFOojbHsP3UdzruDaEdIbSUZ5nniT9DYJMwMqH44t5GqyArqyl1XohRsR2UraYDBpLSSLyEr1Vis7Glovbk2NaAMXyzzYyBtbur4hnv4E-pJ5Amx-E7eNp1gYCgDTkd0zzhBbkhQ7V03xl_KtevTySPIYI8BSIk5TVhB2ROOaxvpwRT4CUPWL5_LY6Y9IV5QAuGIW8EJuhPd_0u7ORFviwvFFuUsI3yQ3DIaTHFnad8DbIPp41dVc1uh58HL8HiSsPa-eqETjYQ8FCFLXhA19zRzdXx2duWVbReR-dMS5CN4jev07z09d5BliOc2M10eDUNoNowZ1Lf8EdZ4oVK0Ym0UPQ94u8U9ImbyvyzKu637BU-tFT1FCVEtQFWjNKy5U4IpxDeQV0bL_8TYkbZydG13kuvRhBcapWIHOXA1PSAX9nMOblxQ1kDbWemJTiiuPq36MfaVDyBgNSIrwRkdNp1Mjppax0En5hB9pLyG8%3D)
Friend, right now, every little thing counts.

We’re gathering a list of local spots to help out by ordering take out, or buying a gift card for a nurse or doctor, local police, or an EMT, or your local grocer. It’s a great way to brighten someone else's day and help out a local business!

**We don't want to leave anyone out, so please join us today to rally around the backbone of our community and click this link to support a local business:[https://claudiaforcongress.com/support-local-businesses/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79728608749e4e2f9e957a24c1bea84e&_e=avgFOojbHsP3UdzruDaEdIbSUZ5nniT9DYJMwMqH44t5GqyArqyl1XohRsR2UraYDBpLSSLyEr1Vis7Glovbk2NaAMXyzzYyBtbur4hnv4E-pJ5Amx-E7eNp1gYCgDTkd0zzhBbkhQ7V03xl_KtevTySPIYI8BSIk5TVhB2ROOaxvpwRT4CUPWL5_LY6Y9IV5QAuGIW8EJuhPd_0u7ORFviwvFFuUsI3yQ3DIaTHFnad8DbIPp41dVc1uh58HL8HiSsPa-eqETjYQ8FCFLXhAxf1rw2V7ICVFFybKdX6c1PYll6R6zZcAcZ78c4x16q3LfWRlmA5QhlyN6_1DsMb0jEGPWgANdqWUcxA-2aT7WARdTkWnzYyPOaMJYbQjp1EqJm-QDkpykssrtUWXQoUY_D8S19WkcjIIigjeBjRGIbEpohMgtPfK_07nPzVLhQ4mzwdF2HPf4_UWck7oU_AYVSEE5Mbr9ooIpf4REfX9qs%3D)**

We're all in this together, friend - and we'll make it through.

-Claudia Tenney

name: Charles Booker
subject: Halting aid? In this economy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Mitch McConnell still wants to play political games.
#
This is outrageous.
**Yesterday, Mitch McConnell stood against passing more COVID-19 relief efforts –** specifically, the fourth coronavirus bill that's being written to include economic recovery measures from the virus.
This callous announcement comes after reports yesterday that the unemployment rate is around 13% _right now,_ and rising at a speed unmatched in American history.
Our economy is in a freefall and millions of families are struggling to figure out how to put food on the table – but Mitch McConnell still wants to play political games.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16854687/179409015/198219479?refcode=em20200403&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjMTcwMS1mNTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-mS8LJvVQq8NVnTCKjpgL8J6tQLbwIEj1EMXvRSdwo=)
**[If Mitch thinks he has another term after this catastrophic failure, he is terribly wrong. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to my campaign – our grassroots movement – to get Mitch out of office and flip the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16854701/179409029/198219479?refcode=em20200403&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjMTcwMS1mNTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-mS8LJvVQq8NVnTCKjpgL8J6tQLbwIEj1EMXvRSdwo=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16854702/179409030/198219479?refcode=em20200403&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjMTcwMS1mNTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-mS8LJvVQq8NVnTCKjpgL8J6tQLbwIEj1EMXvRSdwo=)****
It's no secret that Mitch has always been out of touch with the needs of Kentuckians.
But he's really crossed a line now by _actively stopping_ Congress from providing economic relief for unemployed Americans and anyone else struggling to make ends meet.
**That makes it crystal clear to me that he doesn't give a damn.**
Kentucky deserves so much more than what Mitch McConnell has been giving us for the last 30 years.
**We need leadership. We need comprehensive relief. We need a new senator from Kentucky.[Our people-powered, progressive campaign has the best chance to defeat Mitch — will you chip in $5 to support our movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16854703/179409031/198219479?refcode=em20200403&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjMTcwMS1mNTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-mS8LJvVQq8NVnTCKjpgL8J6tQLbwIEj1EMXvRSdwo=)**
I know that as Senator, I'll be on the line, fighting with everyday people like you and me, for the things we deserve.
But I can't do it without your help.
Let's do this,
Charles
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself – we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16854704/179409032/198219479?refcode=em20200403-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjMTcwMS1mNTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-mS8LJvVQq8NVnTCKjpgL8J6tQLbwIEj1EMXvRSdwo=)****

name: Team Marsha
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
In a clear and desperate attempt to politicize a global crisis, Nancy Pelosi just announced the formation of a new committee to investigate the federal response to the coronavirus outbreak in the U.S.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIxNzc2ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDMxNzk5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****
__
Democrats just won't stop.

In a clear and desperate attempt to politicize a global crisis, Nancy Pelosi just announced the formation of a new committee to investigate the federal response to the coronavirus outbreak in the U.S.

Even after President Trump was acquitted by the Senate of the impeachment charges made against him by the hyper-partisan, radical House Democrats, the _**Left is relentless in their mission to slander our president.**_

This latest stunt is just that -- another witch hunt, another sham investigation, another attempt to distract the American people.

Pelosi's investigation is not only political theater at the expense of American taxpayers, but it's an irresponsible deflection of leadership and accountability of who we should be holding responsible: China.

**Can we count on you to join Marsha Blackburn and millions of conservative patriots across the country in coming together to stand with President Trump and put an end to the Democrats shameful stunt?**

**[CHIP IN $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIxNzc2ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDMxNzk5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDIxNzc2ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDMxNzk5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Democrats in Congress have already done an incredible amount of damage to the country and wasted millions in taxpayer dollars and resources with their frivolous, partisan investigations. And now they're complicit in shifting blame and covering up China's recklessness.

Peter, enough is enough. The American people are sick and tired of the Left's political games.

[Join Marsha and stand with President Trump against the Left's partisan investigations -- make a contribution today.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIxNzc2ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDMxNzk5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDIxNzc2ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDMxNzk5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
|
#
| | **"New Polls And New Candidates Are Giving Democrats Some Hope Of Flipping The Senate"**
_— FiveThirtyEight_
* * *
**[If you’re financially able, chip in just $4 to help Democrats flip the four seats we need to take back the Senate. You can donate right here to help us hold strong in Minnesota and flip the majority:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16855067/179412315/-870976212?refcode=em200403-four&amounts=4,10,25,50,100,200,500&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjhmYWY1Yy1mNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfQ2R_mH-IQqdt2fcPipACTby866hS_MGHRGcg968Mo=)** | [Chip in $4!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16855069/179412317/-870976212?refcode=em200403-four&amounts=4,10,25,50,100,200,500&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjhmYWY1Yy1mNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfQ2R_mH-IQqdt2fcPipACTby866hS_MGHRGcg968Mo=)
---
The Democrats’ chances of flipping the Senate get better by the day, folks, with new polls showing our candidates surging into the lead in battleground states.
This news has Republicans running scared because they can’t afford to lose a single seat. But they also know that if they defeat incumbents like Tina Smith, Democrats have virtually no chance to take back the Senate.
We can’t afford to lose this seat, folks, not when we’re this close to flipping the majority and taking the gavel out of Mitch McConnell’s hands. So, we’re asking:
**[Can you chip in $4 (that’s $1 for each seat we need to flip!) to help our team hold strong in Minnesota and take back the Senate? Please, only pitch in if you can afford to do so. Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16855071/179412319/-870976212?refcode=em200403-four&amounts=4,10,25,50,100,200,500&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjhmYWY1Yy1mNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfQ2R_mH-IQqdt2fcPipACTby866hS_MGHRGcg968Mo=)**
[Chip in $4!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16855073/179412321/-870976212?refcode=em200403-four&amounts=4,10,25,50,100,200,500&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjhmYWY1Yy1mNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfQ2R_mH-IQqdt2fcPipACTby866hS_MGHRGcg968Mo=)
---
We have a huge opportunity to take back the Senate, but only if the Democrats running for re-election (like Tina!) win their races too. That’s why your donation matters so much.
But we understand how difficult it can be to donate right now, so we’re only asking you to chip in if you can afford to do so. The most important thing you can do is take care of yourself and your loved ones.
Thanks for anything you are able to give today. Stay safe and healthy.
— Save Minnesota’s Senate Seat
_P.S. I know this is a difficult time for everyone, so please stay safe out there. To receive fewer emails during this public health emergency,**[please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16855075/179412323/704600832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjhmYWY1Yy1mNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfQ2R_mH-IQqdt2fcPipACTby866hS_MGHRGcg968Mo=&emci=038faf5c-f775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=068faf5c-f775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: Stop Court Controlled Mail-In Elections! We Heard You NM!
body:
True the Vote Joins New Mexico Citizens in Battle | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/efc706862120/stop-court-controlled-mail-in-elections-we-heard-you-nm?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE **
**True the Vote Joins New Mexico Citizens
Battle to Stop Court-Controlled Mail-In Elections**
True the Vote has joined with New Mexican voters to intervene in a lawsuit in which several county clerks and the New Mexico Secretary of State, without opposition, are requesting the Supreme Court of New Mexico to order that the upcoming June 2nd primary election be restricted to mail-in ballots only, eliminating entirely both in-person and absentee balloting. These Democrat government officials based their request on the national health crisis caused by the COVID-19 virus.
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2300de1b99&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| Under the New Mexico Constitution, only the Legislature has the authority to determine the time, place, and manner of voting in New Mexico elections. The government officials assert, however, that the legislature is wholly incapable of addressing this problem and that the New Mexico Supreme Court should order the election be conducted by mail-in ballot only, dispensing of all other state laws that protect elections from voter fraud. In contrast, the voters seeking to intervene in the case claim that their fundamental right to vote will be violated by a mail-in-ballot only election since their votes will be diluted by illegal voting if the fraud prevention provisions of in-person and absentee ballot are dispensed with. Furthermore, due to inaccuracies in the voter registry many eligible voters will not get ballots and their ability to vote will be comprised. Catherine Engelbrecht, President of True the Vote, the organization funding the lawsuit, remarks: “This unchallenged petition is the tip of the spear of a concerted national effort by the Left and the Democrat Party to engineer epic levels of election chaos. Limiting votes only to mail-in ballots, as proposed in the New Mexico suit, would all but ensure an a process fraught with both ballot fraud and vote harvesting. Under this scheme, the legal safeguards that are attendant to in-person and absentee voting would be dispensed with entirely. ” James Bopp, Jr., of The Bopp Law Firm PC, lead counsel for the New Mexican Voters, and General Counsel for True the Vote says: “There are national implications for voters nationwide. There is no precedent for such an extraordinary legal action seeking to overturn laws passed laws by the Legislature to regulate voting in state elections and to put the state courts in charge. Should these Democrat politicians succeed here, it would create a precedent for other state courts to follow in New Mexico’s footsteps and to impose similarly unprotected and unrestricted voting procedures though the nearly unlimited equitable power of the courts.” [**A full copy of the brief can be found here. **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1c223fc125&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=42440f81f1&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1905bb66a0&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=57a109f70d&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [HELP US STAY IN THE FIGHT - PLEASE DONATE ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=51aafa53e8&e=ad8cba7e98 "HELP US STAY IN THE FIGHT - PLEASE DONATE ")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You signed up for this e-mail on our website at www.truethevote.org

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109 #19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98&c=0bcea55e33).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/monkey-rewards/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monkey_rewards&aid=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&afl=1)

Under this scheme, the legal safeguards that are attendant to in-person and absentee voting would be dispensed with entirely. ” James Bopp, Jr., of The Bopp Law Firm PC, lead counsel for the New Mexican Voters, and General Counsel for True the Vote says: “There are national implications for voters nationwide. There is no precedent for such an extraordinary legal action seeking to overturn laws passed laws by the Legislature to regulate voting in state elections and to put the state courts in charge. Should these Democrat politicians succeed here, it would create a precedent for other state courts to follow in New Mexico’s footsteps and to impose similarly unprotected and unrestricted voting procedures though the nearly unlimited equitable power of the courts.” | | | | | | | | | | | | "HELP US STAY IN THE FIGHT - PLEASE DONATE " | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved. You signed up for this e-mail on our website at www.truethevote.org Our mailing address is: True the VotePO Box 3109 #19128Houston, TX 77253-3109 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: The President’s anti-Asian rhetoric is dangerous and distracting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
body:
Team,

Instead of focusing on the task at hand and leading our nation through this time of uncertainty, our President would rather stoke flames of xenophobia and needlessly pass the blame onto others.

By using pejoratives like "Chinese Virus" or "Wuhan Virus," the President is both ignoring the medically accurate label for COVID-19 and unfairly associating it with Chinese Americans. As a result of this stigma, many Asian Americans across the country have reported an uptick in physical and verbal harassment.

That’s why I, along with Congresswoman Judy Chu and Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal, penned a letter to President Trump condemning the anti-Asian rhetoric emanating from his office and the subsequent discrimination and violence it has encouraged.

Rhetoric like the President and his cabinet officials are using have serious consequences for the safety and well-being of Asian-Americans across the country. The CDC specifically recommends against associating a disease with a region or ethnicity because of the danger it poses.

This xenophobic language only serves as a distraction to the mission at hand -- to practice social distancing, relieve our health care system, and flatten the curve so we can save lives and begin to return back to normal.

Folks around the country have enough hardships to grapple with during this pandemic -- from health concerns to food insecurity to loss of income and so much more. It’s cruel to cause even more trauma in the Asian American community by continuing to promote this ugly, misleading, and dangerous stigma.

I will continue fighting alongside my fellow advocates in Congress to denounce hatred and bigotry, reduce hate crimes and ensure they are being properly investigated, and protect the most vulnerable in our community.

Thank you,

Congressman Al Green

Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can https://act.myngp.com/el/OkDtyq2jOEyRuonhynb88JEHRuYa1JI0_BY_7O6d1Qg=/UvSyc-8E6bCZ3SGbih-ZjLQlUocbvCinhJoZcXDjxm4= here.

--------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
--------------------------------------------------------------

Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States
